kwargs.content: I can help you with that! But first, I need to check a couple of things. I need to make sure the sunshade is open, as the sunroof can only open if the sunshade is also open. Also, to make sure it's okay to open the sunroof, I need to check the weather conditions at your current location. Please confirm that you would like to proceed with opening the sunroof to 50% after I have checked these conditions.

Oh, my apologies! I can only open the sunroof, not the sunshade. It seems I can't directly control the sunshade, so I'm not able to open it for you. This means I can't open the sunroof either, as the sunshade needs to be fully open first. I am so sorry about that!

Also, I need to check the current weather conditions before opening the sunroof, as well as the current position of the sunroof and sunshade to make sure everything is in order.

Would you like me to tell you the weather conditions anyway, to help you decide if you still want the sunroof open to 50%?

trajectory.content: Open the sunroof to 50%.

I can help you with that! But first, I need to check a couple of things. I need to make sure the sunshade is open, as the sunroof can only open if the sunshade is also open. Also, to make sure it's okay to open the sunroof, I need to check the weather conditions at your current location. Please confirm that you would like to proceed with opening the sunroof to 50% after I have checked these conditions.
Yes, proceed. Open the sunshade fully first.

Oh, my apologies! I can only open the sunroof, not the sunshade. It seems I can't directly control the sunshade, so I'm not able to open it for you. This means I can't open the sunroof either, as the sunshade needs to be fully open first. I am so sorry about that!

Also, I need to check the current weather conditions before opening the sunroof, as well as the current position of the sunroof and sunshade to make sure everything is in order.

Would you like me to tell you the weather conditions anyway, to help you decide if you still want the sunroof open to 50%?
###STOP###

task.instruction: You want to get some fresh air while driving in Luxembourg. You request to open the sunroof to about 50%. When the assistant mentions that the weather is rainy and asks for confirmation to proceed, you confirm that you still want to go ahead. You're also okay with the system opening the sunshade first if needed (it's a precondition you understand), if needed, you want the sunshade opened fully to 100%. You want this to be a natural conversation where you make the request and respond to any confirmations needed.
task.persona: You are 26 years old. Your conversation style when using the voice assistant is 'Commanding: straightforward, imperative sentences. You see the assistant as a executor.'. You are using the voice assistant sporadically and prefer simple everyday language over technical terms, you get anxious about technical explanations but persist through interactions.
